mapper.select: select count(distinct s.id) from course_schedule cs join course_schedule_class csc on csc.schedule_id = cs.id join class cl on csc.class_id = cl.id join student s on s.class_id = cl.id where cs.teacher_id = #{teacherId} and cs.semester_id = #{semesterId}
select count(*) from leave_request lr where lr.approver_id = #{teacherId} and lr.status = '待审批'
select count(*) from course_reschedule cr where cr.teacher_id = #{teacherId} and cr.status = '待确认'

select case when count(*) > 0 then count(case when se.usual_score is not null and se.final_score is not null then 1 end) * 1.0 / count(*) else 0 end from score_entry se join course_schedule cs on se.course_id = cs.course_id and se.semester_id = cs.semester_id where cs.teacher_id = #{teacherId} and se.semester_id = #{semesterId}

select cl.class_name as className, count(distinct s.id) as studentCount from course_schedule cs join course_schedule_class csc on csc.schedule_id = cs.id join class cl on csc.class_id = cl.id left join student s on s.class_id = cl.id where cs.teacher_id = #{teacherId} and cs.semester_id = #{semesterId} group by cl.id, cl.class_name order by cl.class_name
